remember: Students will be able to recall the types of financial markets, their functions, and characteristics.
Students will be able to explain the role of financial markets in the economy.
Students will be able to identify the key features of different financial markets (primary, secondary, foreign exchange market).
Students will be able to list the participants in financial markets and their roles.
Students will be able to distinguish between primary and secondary markets.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of financial markets and their importance.
Students will be able to comprehend the functions of financial markets, including price discovery, risk management, and liquidity provision.
Students will be able to recognize the role of financial markets in facilitating economic growth and development.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of financial markets on the economy and society.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of financial markets to real-world scenarios.
Students will be able to evaluate the advantages and disadvantages of different financial markets.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different types of financial markets.
Students will be able to recommend investment strategies based on an understanding of financial markets.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between financial markets and economic stability.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of policy changes on financial markets.
Students will be able to compare the performance of different financial markets.
Students will be able to identify the factors that influence the functioning of financial markets.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of financial markets and their functions.
Describe the characteristics of primary and secondary markets.
Explain the role of foreign exchange market in the context of financial markets.
Discuss the importance of financial markets in the economy.
board_exam_objectives: Describe the types of financial markets and their functions.
Explain the role of financial markets in facilitating economic growth and development.
Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of different financial markets.
Analyze the impact of financial markets on the economy and society.
